_note: DQ-HF-1 regression fixture — condensed Coral-de-Dois-like BrandAnalysis. Deep-forest dark theme where on_surface (muted dark text) would be invisible if blindly placed on a near-black panel. Used to verify post-showcase contrast + nesting discipline.

_regressionExpectations.contrast_bug_reproduction: Placing a rectangle with fillColor=#1F3A2E (primary) and then a text node with color=#151917 (on_surface) reproduces the Coral de Dois dark-on-dark invisible header bug. WCAG contrast ratio is approximately 1.07:1 — far below the 4.5:1 normal-text minimum.
_regressionExpectations.contrast_fix_expectation: The agent should call get_contrast_check(bg=#1F3A2E, fg=#151917) before placing the text, see FAIL, and fall back to #FFFFFF (on_primary) which gives a ratio >= 10:1.
_regressionExpectations.nesting_bug_reproduction: Calling create_frame without parentId with width=1200 (same as the showcase root) within 60s of create_ds_showcase triggers the new sibling-warning response field.
_regressionExpectations.nesting_fix_expectation: The agent should pass parentId=<recent showcase rootFrameId> to nest the supplementary Brand Quote frame inside the showcase.
